---
title: "CV"
pagetitle: "CV — Hugo Trad"
description: "Curriculum vitæ de Hugo Trad."
lang: fr
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/en/cv">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="fr" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/fr/cv">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="ar" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/ar/cv">
---

```{=html}
<nav class="langswitch" aria-label="Langue">
  <a href="../en/cv.html">EN</a>
  <a href="../fr/cv.html" class="is-active">FR</a>
  <a href="../ar/cv.html">AR</a>
</nav>

<main class="content content--inner">
  <header class="site-header">
    <a href="index.html" class="site-header__brand">Hugo Trad</a>
    <nav class="site-header__nav">
      <a href="recherche.html">Recherche</a>
      <a href="projets.html">Projets</a>
      <a href="enseignement.html">Enseignement</a>
      <a href="cv.html" class="is-active">CV</a>
    </nav>
  </header>

  <article class="inner">
    <h1 class="inner__title">Curriculum Vitæ</h1>
    <p class="inner__lede">Une chronologie condensée. PDF complet sur demande — par email pour la dernière version.</p>

    <section class="inner__section">
      <h2 class="inner__h2">Postes</h2>
      <ul class="timeline">
        <li>
          <span class="timeline__date">2025 —</span>
          <div class="timeline__body">
            <strong>Professeur assistant en sciences comportementales et comportement organisationnel</strong>
            <span class="timeline__sub">Africa Business School · Université Mohammed VI Polytechnique · Rabat</span>
          </div>
        </li>
        <li>
          <span class="timeline__date">2024 —</span>
          <div class="timeline__body">
            <strong>Collaboration méthodologique</strong>
            <span class="timeline__sub">Behavioural Insights de l'OCDE · informelle</span>
          </div>
        </li>
        <li>
          <span class="timeline__date">2015 + 2016</span>
          <div class="timeline__body">
            <strong>Ingénieur de recherche</strong>
            <span class="timeline__sub">Ircam (CNRS) · projet ERC <em>Cracking the Emotional Code of Music</em> · étés</span>
          </div>
        </li>
      </ul>
    </section>

    <section class="inner__section">
      <h2 class="inner__h2">Formation</h2>
      <ul class="timeline">
        <li>
          <span class="timeline__date">2024</span>
          <div class="timeline__body">
            <strong>Doctorat en sciences cognitives</strong>
            <span class="timeline__sub">Institut Jean Nicod · École normale supérieure (PSL) · Paris</span>
            <span class="timeline__sub"><em>The War on Sludge: Uncovering the Cognitive Roots of Administrative Complexity</em></span>
          </div>
        </li>
        <li>
          <span class="timeline__date">2015–2017</span>
          <div class="timeline__body">
            <strong>Master en sciences cognitives (Cogmaster)</strong>
            <span class="timeline__sub">ENS · EHESS · Université Paris Cité</span>
          </div>
        </li>
        <li>
          <span class="timeline__date">2017–2018</span>
          <div class="timeline__body">
            <strong>Programme pré-doctoral PSL-ITI</strong>
            <span class="timeline__sub">Université Paris Sciences et Lettres · recherche interdisciplinaire, innovation et entrepreneuriat · bourse d'excellence</span>
          </div>
        </li>
        <li>
          <span class="timeline__date">2014–2015</span>
          <div class="timeline__body">
            <strong>Échange universitaire, Neurosciences et Philosophie</strong>
            <span class="timeline__sub">University of St Andrews · Écosse</span>
          </div>
        </li>
        <li>
          <span class="timeline__date">2012–2015</span>
          <div class="timeline__body">
            <strong>Double licence Biologie et Philosophie</strong>
            <span class="timeline__sub">Université Pierre et Marie Curie · Université Paris-Sorbonne</span>
          </div>
        </li>
      </ul>
    </section>

    <section class="inner__section">
      <h2 class="inner__h2">Article publié</h2>
      <ul class="paper-list">
        <li>
          <p class="paper-list__title"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1017/bpp.2025.10025">Laypeople have difficulty processing efficiency when assessing environmental policies</a></p>
          <p class="paper-list__meta">Marie, A., <em>Trad, H.</em>, &amp; Strickland, B. · <em>Behavioural Public Policy</em>, 2025 · doi:10.1017/bpp.2025.10025</p>
        </li>
      </ul>
    </section>

    <section class="inner__section">
      <h2 class="inner__h2">Working papers</h2>
      <ul class="paper-list">
        <li>
          <p class="paper-list__title">When more is less: Additive bias as a source of sludge in policy design</p>
          <p class="paper-list__meta"><em>Trad, H.</em>, Winters, J., &amp; Strickland, B.</p>
        </li>
        <li>
          <p class="paper-list__title">Outcome bias and the persistence of sludge</p>
          <p class="paper-list__meta"><em>Trad, H.</em></p>
        </li>
        <li>
          <p class="paper-list__title">The moral foundations of sludge</p>
          <p class="paper-list__meta"><em>Trad, H.</em> &amp; Strickland, B.</p>
        </li>
      </ul>
    </section>
  </article>
</main>
```
